# Partner Program

## Overview

The BrainSAIT Partner Program enables organizations to deliver our AI-powered healthcare solutions to their customers. We offer multiple partnership models to suit different business strategies and capabilities.

---

## Partner Types

### Technology Partners

**Description:** Technology companies that integrate BrainSAIT into their platforms

**Benefits:**
- API access and documentation
- Technical integration support
- Joint solution development
- Co-marketing opportunities

**Requirements:**
- Technical capability
- Customer base in healthcare
- Implementation resources
- Support commitment

### System Integrators

**Description:** Professional services firms that implement BrainSAIT solutions

**Benefits:**
- Implementation certification
- Lead referrals
- Training and enablement
- Marketing support

**Requirements:**
- Healthcare IT experience
- Implementation team
- Project management
- Support capability

### Resellers

**Description:** Organizations that sell BrainSAIT licenses to customers

**Benefits:**
- Competitive margins
- Sales enablement
- Deal registration
- Marketing funds

**Requirements:**
- Sales team
- Customer relationships
- Territory coverage
- Revenue commitment

### Consulting Partners

**Description:** Advisory firms that recommend BrainSAIT to clients

**Benefits:**
- Referral compensation
- Early product access
- Executive briefings
- Research collaboration

**Requirements:**
- Healthcare practice
- Advisory influence
- Client relationships

---

## Partner Tiers

### Registered

**Criteria:**
- Partner agreement signed
- Initial training completed
- First opportunity identified

**Benefits:**
- Partner portal access
- Basic sales materials
- Standard margins
- Email support

### Silver

**Criteria:**
- 2+ completed implementations
- Certified resources
- Annual revenue: 250K+ SAR

**Benefits:**
- All Registered benefits
- Enhanced margins
- Lead sharing
- Quarterly reviews
- Marketing co-fund: 5%

### Gold

**Criteria:**
- 5+ completed implementations
- 3+ certified resources
- Annual revenue: 1M+ SAR

**Benefits:**
- All Silver benefits
- Premium margins
- Priority support
- Named partner manager
- Marketing co-fund: 10%
- Joint business planning

### Platinum

**Criteria:**
- 10+ completed implementations
- 5+ certified resources
- Annual revenue: 3M+ SAR
- Strategic alignment

**Benefits:**
- All Gold benefits
- Best margins
- Executive sponsorship
- Product roadmap input
- Marketing co-fund: 15%
- Joint go-to-market

---

## Program Benefits

### Sales Support

- Deal registration and protection
- Opportunity management
- Proposal support
- Pricing guidance
- Competitive intelligence

### Technical Enablement

- Product training
- Certification programs
- Technical documentation
- Lab environments
- Expert consultations

### Marketing Support

- Partner logo and badges
- Co-branded materials
- Joint campaigns
- Event participation
- Case studies

### Business Development

- Lead generation
- Market insights
- Strategic planning
- Executive engagement

---

## Certification Program

### Sales Certification

**Content:**
- Product overview
- Value proposition
- Competitive positioning
- Sales methodology
- Objection handling

**Format:** Online + exam
**Duration:** 4 hours
**Validity:** 1 year

### Technical Certification

**Content:**
- Architecture overview
- Implementation methodology
- Integration patterns
- Troubleshooting
- Best practices

**Format:** Online + lab + exam
**Duration:** 16 hours
**Validity:** 1 year

### Implementation Certification

**Content:**
- Project methodology
- Configuration
- Testing procedures
- Go-live process
- Support transition

**Format:** Classroom + project
**Duration:** 40 hours
**Validity:** 1 year

---

## Deal Registration

### Benefits

- Opportunity protection (90 days)
- Enhanced discount
- Priority support
- Sales assistance

### Process

1. Submit registration via portal
2. Review within 48 hours
3. Approval notification
4. Begin sales cycle
5. Close and book

### Rules

- First to register wins
- Customer qualification required
- Active engagement expected
- Extensions available

---

## Revenue Model

### Resale Margins

| Tier | License | Services |
|------|---------|----------|
| Registered | 15% | 5% |
| Silver | 20% | 8% |
| Gold | 25% | 10% |
| Platinum | 30% | 12% |

### Referral Fees

| Type | Fee |
|------|-----|
| Qualified lead | 5% |
| Influenced deal | 10% |
| Co-sell deal | 15% |

---

## Partner Onboarding

### Week 1-2: Foundation

- Agreement execution
- Portal access
- Initial training
- Resource assignment

### Week 3-4: Enablement

- Sales certification
- Technical overview
- Marketing materials
- First opportunity

### Month 2: Activation

- Technical certification
- Demo environment
- Joint planning
- First pipeline

### Month 3+: Execution

- Active selling
- Implementation start
- Quarterly reviews
- Growth planning

---

## Performance Management

### Metrics

| Metric | Measurement | Frequency |
|--------|-------------|-----------|
| Revenue | Booked licenses | Quarterly |
| Pipeline | Registered deals | Monthly |
| Certifications | Active credentials | Quarterly |
| Satisfaction | Customer NPS | Annually |

### Reviews

- Monthly: Pipeline review
- Quarterly: Business review
- Annually: Strategic planning

---

## Program Governance

### Partner Requirements

- Maintain certifications
- Meet revenue targets
- Customer satisfaction
- Ethical conduct
- Brand compliance

### Program Changes

- 90-day notice for changes
- Annual tier evaluation
- Appeals process available

---

## Get Started

### Application Process

1. Submit interest at partners.brainsait.com
2. Initial qualification call
3. Business case review
4. Agreement execution
5. Onboarding kickoff
